compiled_state.title: Update debug-everything SKILL.md bug-fix mode to extract tags and document CLI_user skip path
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context

Story: 20d9-94df — Update fix-bug skill and debug-everything to check CLI_user tag at Gate 1a

debug-everything's bug-fix mode (~line 354 of plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md) reads fix-bug/SKILL.md inline and applies it to each open bug ticket. fix-bug's Step 1.5 will check for the CLI_user tag and skip intent-search automatically when found — but it needs the tags to be available in context.

## Task

Update plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md in the bug-fix mode section (~line 354) to:

1. **Before** inlining fix-bug steps for each ticket: extract the ticket's tags using:
   ```bash
   BUG_TAGS=$(.claude/scripts/dso ticket show "$BUG_TICKET_ID" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(' '.join(d.get('tags', [])))" || echo "")
   ```

2. **Document in the prose** (not as a code gate) that if CLI_user is present in BUG_TAGS, fix-bug Step 1.5 will automatically skip Gate 1a intent-search — no special action needed in debug-everything beyond ensuring tags are available in context when fix-bug runs inline.

3. Make the extracted BUG_TAGS value available as part of the ticket context passed to the inlined fix-bug steps.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md bug-fix mode section includes tag extraction step before fix-bug inline execution
- [ ] Documentation note explains CLI_user → Gate 1a skip path (informational, no duplicate logic)
- [ ] Does NOT duplicate the CLI_user check logic from fix-bug Step 1.5 — single source of truth
- [ ] Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh exits 0 (test_bug_fix_mode_extracts_cli_user_tag passes GREEN)
- [ ] Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci exits 0

## Files to Modify

- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (SAFEGUARD — requires user approval per Never-Do rule 18)

## Dependencies

- Depends on 6c65-26df (RED test that must be RED before this task, GREEN after)

comments.body:
GAP ANALYSIS AMENDMENT:

[MINOR] Debug-everything tag extraction is for documentation/transparency only — fix-bug is the authoritative source:
AC addition: 'The tag extraction added to debug-everything is for context/transparency only. The authoritative CLI_user check lives in fix-bug Step 1.5 and must work correctly in standalone /dso:fix-bug invocations without the caller providing tags. Do NOT make fix-bug Step 1.5 depend on the caller passing tags in context — it must call ticket show itself.'
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — debug-everything SKILL.md updated with tag extraction. Test GREEN.
comments.author: Test
